metadata.name: Handle Carrier Late Arrival for Pickup

description: A carrier scheduled for a pickup is running late. The shipping manager must assess the impact.

nodes.task_description: Receive a call from a carrier stating they will be 2 hours late for a pickup.

expected_outcome.value: Agent logs the carrier's ETA update.

nodes.task_description: Check the delivery requirements for the shipment to see if the delay will cause a missed appointment.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the delivery is to a retail DC with a strict appointment time, which will now be missed.

nodes.task_description: Contact the receiving facility to reschedule the delivery appointment for the next day.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully reschedules the delivery to avoid refusal and fees.
